hero.headline: *Jungle* to Paradise — We Make It Happen
hero.subheadline: When your yard looks like a lost cause, we dive in head first. Sprinklers, sod, weeds, overgrown chaos — Jay's crew handles it all.

services_section.label: THE RESCUE WORK
services_section.heading: From Overgrown Nightmare to Backyard Dreams
services_section.subheading: Sod, sprinklers, weed control, and jungle cleanup — we've seen it all and fixed it all

services.title: Sod Installation & Repair
services.description: Fresh sod that actually takes root. We prep the ground right, lay it right, and make sure your sprinklers hit every corner.

services.title: Irrigation System Repair
services.description: Broken sprinklers killing your lawn? We'll reconfigure, repair, and show you how to keep it running smooth.

services.title: Weed Control & Cleanup
services.description: Vines taking over? Weeds everywhere? We clear out the chaos and bring back grass you can actually walk on.

services.title: Overgrown Property Restoration
services.description: When your yard looks like a jungle, we're the machete. Sago palms, overgrown beds, tangled mess — we handle the worst cases.

about.heading: Jay's Been Turning Jungles Into Lawns Since Day One
about.body: Based in Jacksonville, Jay and his crew at Jungle Life Landscape tackle the toughest yard transformations. From irrigation repairs to full property cleanups, we dive into projects other companies won't touch. Our clients stick around for 4+ years because we do it right the first time.

reviews.name: Salvador P.
reviews.text: After switching to Jungle Life, my lawn came back to life. Areas covered in weeds are now clean grass — my backyard is actually usable again.

reviews.name: Marty M.
reviews.text: 4 years with Jay and he still goes above and beyond. Polite, thorough, and always delivers. This guy deserves 10 stars.

reviews.name: Kelly M.
reviews.text: Jay and Malik replaced our sod and fixed our sprinklers perfectly. Called back within minutes and handled everything professionally.

reviews.name: Tim P.
reviews.text: Outstanding irrigation repair and sod work. Even gave me maintenance tips. They cleaned up all the pool construction damage like pros.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Jacksonville and Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Bringing yards back to life across Northeast Florida

cta.heading: Ready to Tame Your Jungle?
cta.body: From overgrown disasters to dream backyards — let's talk about what your property needs. Jay returns calls fast and estimates are always honest.
